'''Spence''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who joined the [[Erased]] along with his [[Twin/Legends|twin]] brother, [[Gilly]], after the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] was reorganized into the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] by [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. Spence and his brother never talked much and kept things to themselves after they joined the resistance group. When [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] attacked one of the bases, Spence fought alongside his brother to defend the base, but they had no chance and were both shot down by concentrated fire.<ref name="LOTJU" />
